message:
refactor(fcp-host): use idiomatic entry API for connector state map access

Replace the manual contains_key/insert/unwrap pattern in
connector_state_mut() with Rust's entry().or_default() API. This
eliminates a redundant key lookup, reduces the chance of panics from
the intermediate unwrap, and follows idiomatic Rust conventions for
map-or-insert patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
